notes: Phone LANDSCAPE bottom tool bar (cbar) centring (2026-06). The cbar was anchored to the bottom-right corner; it now sits horizontally centred in the free space between the joystick + ▲▼ arrow group (left) and the right edge — same treatment the iPad already got (user request 「ジョイスティックと右端の間の左右中央」). Verified at 844×390: cbar centre x=570 (= (296+W)/2), clears the joystick group (right≈278) by 155px, no right overflow for any landscape phone ≥570px wide. bottom:24 keeps it on the shared baseline with the joystick. Builds on v0.0.12.
